parents.subject: LU-19736 doc: Add man page for llapi_get_obd_count

commit.subject: LU-19929 llite: include generic prefetch()
commit.message:
LU-19929 llite: include generic prefetch()

On some kernel the arch specific prefetch() is not available.
Including the `linux/prefetch.h` as fallback.

Impact:
- Fixes: 'implicit declaration of function prefetchw'
  compilation error on  some RISC-V kernel.
- No functional impact (prefetchw is a performance hint)
- Maintains optimization where available
  while enabling RISC-V builds with fallback where needed.

Tested on:
- Ubuntu 24.04 RISC-V with Linux kernel 6.8.0-35-generic
- Fedora 42 RISC-V with Linux kernel 6.16.4-200

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Abdul Halim <abdul.halim@openchip.com>
Change-Id: Ia97a97adc748f1ffa40f9b156d566111d3773d3a
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/64527
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
